pom.xml.general_idea: Add Apache Commons Lang3 dependency for utility functions.
Add ModelMapper dependency for object mapping.

src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Enable MongoDB auditing features by adding the @EnableMongoAuditing annotation to the application class.
Register a custom ModelMapper bean that converts empty strings to null using Apache Commons Lang.
Refactor field injection to constructor injection for better testability and immutability.
Introduce `ProductForm` DTO and `ModelMapper` to decouple controller parameters from domain model.
Add explicit HTTP method constraint to `@RequestMapping` to restrict endpoints to POST.
Add logging statements for debugging and monitoring application flow.
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.after:
LOG.info("Getting list of products");
LOG.debug("Obtained {} products from database", products.size());

src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Add validation layer using `@Valid` and `BindingResult` to handle input errors gracefully.
Add logic to generate a random product code if it is missing.
Add imports for Spring Data auditing annotations and MongoDB indexing.
Add imports for BigDecimal and Date classes used in new fields.
Update author tag in Javadoc comment.
Change field visibility from package-private to private for encapsulation.
Add new unique indexed field prodId.
Change field visibility and add unique index to prodName.
Change field visibility for prodDesc.
Change prodPrice type from Double to BigDecimal for precision.
Change field visibility for prodImage.
Add version field for optimistic locking.
Add createdAt field for auditing.
Add lastModified field for auditing.
Remove constructors as fields are now private and likely managed via setters or framework.
Add getter and setter for new prodId field.
Update prodPrice getter return type to BigDecimal.
Update prodPrice setter parameter type to BigDecimal.
Add getter and setter for version field.
Add getter and setter for createdAt field.
Add getter and setter for lastModified field.
Replace deprecated CrudRepository with MongoRepository to align with modern Spring Data MongoDB standards.
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.why_exists: CrudRepository is deprecated in newer Spring Data versions and may be removed; MongoRepository is the standard interface for MongoDB repositories.
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.before:
import org.springframework.data.repository.CrudRepository;
public interface ProductRepository extends CrudRepository<Product, String> {
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.after:
import org.springframework.data.mongodb.repository.MongoRepository;
public interface ProductRepository extends MongoRepository<Product, String> {

src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Remove overridden delete method as it is provided by default in MongoRepository.
src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.why_exists: Explicit override of delete is unnecessary and may conflict with newer Spring Data implementations if signatures change.

src/main/java/com/springmvc/springmongod.general_idea: Add derived query method for finding first product by name.
Add derived query method for finding product by ID and name.
Add custom query method using @Query annotation for exact product name match.
Add custom query method using @Query annotation for regex-based product name search.

Added UTF-8 charset meta tag to ensure correct character encoding.
Added Bootstrap CSS dependency via WebJars to style the application.
Added custom CSS stylesheet link for application-specific styling.
Wrapped content in a Bootstrap container div for responsive layout.
